executive_summary_zh: 今天候选内容整体偏弱，主要是 GitHub Changelog 的常规产品更新，缺少深入技术说明、评测方法、架构细节或组织落地经验。
相对值得关注的仅有两项：Copilot-reviewed pull request merge metrics 进入 usage metrics API，以及 Copilot CLI 支持 BYOK 和本地模型，这两项都更接近企业级可观测性与模型治理。
executive_summary_en: The candidate set is weak today: mostly routine GitHub changelog entries without deep technical detail, evaluation methodology, architecture insight, or organizational adoption lessons.

The two borderline-worth-tracking items are Copilot-reviewed pull request merge metrics in the usage metrics API and Copilot CLI support for BYOK and local models, as both touch enterprise observability and model governance.

items.title: Copilot-reviewed pull request merge metrics now in the usage metrics API
items.summary_zh: GitHub 在 usage metrics API 中加入了与 Copilot 审查过的 pull request 相关的合并指标，使企业管理员能够从 API 层面跟踪 Copilot 参与代码审查后的结果表现。
items.summary_en: GitHub added merge metrics for Copilot-reviewed pull requests to the usage metrics API, giving enterprise admins an API-level way to track outcomes for PRs that involved Copilot review.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这是少数与 AI 编码组织落地直接相关的更新之一，因为它把“是否用了 AI 审查”与“后续是否合并”连接到企业可观测性体系中。对平台团队而言，这为内部 ROI 分析、团队对比、策略实验和治理报表提供了可自动化的数据入口，尽管目前仍缺少更细的质量维度。
items.why_it_matters_en: This is one of the few updates that directly matters for organizational AI coding adoption because it links AI-assisted review activity to downstream merge outcomes inside enterprise observability workflows. For platform teams, it creates an automatable input for ROI analysis, team comparisons, policy experiments, and governance reporting, even if quality signals are still limited.
key_takeaways_zh: AI 代码审查开始进入企业级 usage metrics API，而不仅是 UI 功能层。
平台团队可以把该指标接入内部 BI、成本分析或 Copilot 采用度仪表盘。
key_takeaways_en: AI code review is starting to surface in enterprise usage APIs, not just product UI.
Platform teams can pipe this metric into internal BI, cost analysis, or Copilot adoption dashboards.

items.title: Copilot CLI now supports BYOK and local models
items.summary_zh: GitHub 宣布 Copilot CLI 支持 BYOK（自带密钥）和本地模型，意味着开发者或企业能够在命令行代理体验中更灵活地选择模型后端与凭证控制方式。
items.summary_en: GitHub announced that Copilot CLI now supports BYOK and local models, allowing developers and enterprises to choose model backends and credential control more flexibly in command-line agent workflows.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 尽管 changelog 信息简短，但它触及当前 AI 编码基础设施最关键的两个方向：模型可替换性和数据边界控制。对于受合规、成本、延迟或知识产权约束的组织，这是推动 AI 工具从“厂商托管功能”走向“可纳入企业平台标准”的必要能力。
items.why_it_matters_en: Even as a short changelog note, it touches two of the most important directions in AI coding infrastructure: model substitutability and data-boundary control. For organizations constrained by compliance, cost, latency, or IP concerns, this is a prerequisite for moving AI tooling from vendor-managed convenience into an enterprise platform standard.
key_takeaways_zh: CLI 级 AI 助手正在支持自带密钥与本地模型，表明控制面逐步开放。
企业可据此探索私有模型、成本分层路由或离线/内网开发场景。
key_takeaways_en: CLI-level AI assistants are beginning to support bring-your-own-key and local-model execution, signaling a more open control plane.
Enterprises can use this to explore private models, cost-tiered routing, or offline/internal development setups.

top_items: Copilot-reviewed pull request merge metrics now in the usage metrics API
Copilot CLI now supports BYOK and local models
themes_zh: 企业级 AI 编码可观测性
模型治理与后端可替换性
implications_zh: 平台团队应开始把 AI 编码工具的使用与结果指标接入统一数据管道，而不只看许可证分配。
未来 AI 编码平台的竞争点将从单一模型能力转向可替换模型、凭证治理和部署边界控制。
implications_en: Platform teams should start integrating AI coding usage and outcome metrics into shared data pipelines rather than tracking only license allocation.
Competitive differentiation in AI coding platforms is shifting from single-model capability toward model interchangeability, credential governance, and deployment-boundary control.
reading_order: Copilot CLI now supports BYOK and local models
Copilot-reviewed pull request merge metrics now in the usage metrics API
what_to_ignore_zh: Notifications 排序、Issue 侧边栏发布信息等常规协作体验更新，对 AI 编码技术战略价值有限。
重复的 GitHub Changelog 索引页和归档页没有新增信息，应忽略。
what_to_ignore_en: Routine collaboration UX changes like notification sorting and issue sidebar release info have limited strategic value for AI coding.
Duplicate GitHub Changelog index/archive pages add no new information and should be ignored.
